title: Results review
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Defines medication and report verification, DHA telehealth scope, emergency exclusions, and laboratory-monitoring purpose.
assessment.rationale: Supports laboratory-result and medicine-change review context for named chronic conditions only.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Laboratory Monitoring of Various Chronic Conditions/Diseases – 21
source.population: People receiving laboratory monitoring for listed chronic conditions, including hypothyroidism, hyperthyroidism, and hyperlipidaemia.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for listed chronic-condition laboratory monitoring in Dubai telehealth; partial for broad follow-up and arbitrary laboratory-result workflows.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines medication and report verification, DHA telehealth scope, emergency exclusions, and laboratory-monitoring purpose.

assessment.text: Lists condition-linked baseline and follow-up laboratory monitoring and states that unlisted testing remains clinician-directed.
assessment.rationale: Supports documenting reviewed results, previous comparisons, and clinician-directed follow-up testing without interpreting the results.
